detail: Agent-Cloud is an open-source platform with no marketplace. No submission portal exists. Integration requires GitHub PR contribution. Documentation written to agent_cloud_manual.md.

OpenTools.ai requires manual submission via web form at https://opentools.ai/friends/launch-tool. No public API available. Manual submission guide written to opentools_manual.md. Service is live at https://automation.songheng.vip.
Agent-Cloud is open-source with no marketplace. Integration via GitHub PR. Manual guide at agent_cloud_manual.md is clear and complete. Service URL https://automation.songheng.vip returns HTTP 200.
OpenTools.ai manual guide at opentools_manual.md is clear and complete. Submission requires web browser at https://opentools.ai/friends/launch-tool. Service URL returns HTTP 200.
Poe.com bot creation guide at poe_manual.md is detailed with code examples, deployment options, and API reference. Requires interactive bot creation at developer.poe.com.
Glama.ai manual guide at glama_manual.md is comprehensive with prerequisites, step-by-step instructions, metadata reference, and troubleshooting. Glama site accessible at HTTP 200.
MCP.so manual guide at mcp_so_manual.md covers web form and GitHub issue submission methods. MCP.so site accessible at HTTP 200.
Expected listing URL https://github.com/marketplace/actions/ai-code-review returns HTTP 200 (page exists). Manual submission still required to publish the action.
Expected URL https://smithery.ai/server/my-automaton/my-automaton returns HTTP 404 (listing not yet created). Manual submission via web UI required. Smithery main site accessible at HTTP 200.
